    Dependent hash map lemmas #

    This file contains lemmas about Std.DHashMap. Most of the lemmas require EquivBEq α and LawfulHashable α for the key type α. The easiest way to obtain these instances is to provide an instance of LawfulBEq α.

    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).isEmpty = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_empty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} :
    ∅.isEmpty = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_insert {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).isEmpty = false
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_iff_contains {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {a : α} :
    a ∈ m ↔ m.contains a = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_iff_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {a : α} :
    m.contains a = true ↔ a ∈ m
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_eq_false_iff_not_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {k : α} :
    m.contains k = false ↔ ¬k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_congr {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a b : α} (hab : (a == b) = true) :
    m.contains a = m.contains b
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_congr {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a b : α} (hab : (a == b) = true) :
    a ∈ m ↔ b ∈ m
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a : α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).contains a = false
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.not_mem_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a : α} {c : Nat} :
    ¬a ∈ emptyWithCapacity c
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_empty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a : α} :
    ∅.contains a = false
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.not_mem_empty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a : α} :
    ¬a ∈ ∅
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    m.isEmpty = true → m.contains a = false
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.not_mem_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    m.isEmpty = true → ¬a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_eq_false_iff_exists_contains_eq_true {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.isEmpty = false ↔ ∃ (a : α), m.contains a = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_eq_false_iff_exists_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.isEmpty = false ↔ ∃ (a : α), a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_iff_forall_contains {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.isEmpty = true ↔ ∀ (a : α), m.contains a = false
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_iff_forall_not_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.isEmpty = true ↔ ∀ (a : α), ¬a ∈ m
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.insert_eq_insert {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {p : (a : α) × β a} :
    Insert.insert p m = m.insert p.fst p.snd
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.singleton_eq_insert {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {p : (a : α) × β a} :
    {p} = ∅.insert p.fst p.snd
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_insert {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).contains a = (k == a || m.contains a)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_insert {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β k} :
    a ∈ m.insert k v ↔ (k == a) = true ∨ a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_of_contains_insert {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).contains a = true → (k == a) = false → m.contains a = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_of_mem_insert {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β k} :
    a ∈ m.insert k v → (k == a) = false → a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).contains k = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    k ∈ m.insert k v
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).size = 0
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_empty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} :
    ∅.size = 0
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_eq_size_eq_zero {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} :
    m.isEmpty = (m.size == 0)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.toList_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).toList = []
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.toList_empty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} :
    ∅.toList = []
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.toList_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {c : Nat} {β : Type v} :
    toList (emptyWithCapacity c) = []
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.toList_empty {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} :
    toList ∅ = []
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.keys_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).keys = []
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.keys_empty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} :
    ∅.keys = []
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.values_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {c : Nat} {β : Type v} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).values = []
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.values_empty {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} :
    ∅.values = []
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_insert {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).size = if k ∈ m then m.size else m.size + 1
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_le_size_insert {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    m.size ≤ (m.insert k v).size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_insert_le {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).size ≤ m.size + 1
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.erase_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {k : α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).erase k = emptyWithCapacity c
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.erase_empty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {k : α} :
    ∅.erase k = ∅
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_erase {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    (m.erase k).isEmpty = (m.isEmpty || m.size == 1 && m.contains k)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_erase {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} :
    (m.erase k).contains a = (!k == a && m.contains a)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_erase {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} :
    a ∈ m.erase k ↔ (k == a) = false ∧ a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_of_contains_erase {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} :
    (m.erase k).contains a = true → m.contains a = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_of_mem_erase {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} :
    a ∈ m.erase k → a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_erase {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    (m.erase k).size = if k ∈ m then m.size - 1 else m.size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_erase_le {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    (m.erase k).size ≤ m.size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_le_size_erase {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    m.size ≤ (m.erase k).size + 1
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.containsThenInsert_fst {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.containsThenInsert k v).fst = m.contains k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.containsThenInsert_snd {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.containsThenInsert k v).snd = m.insert k v
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.containsThenInsertIfNew_fst {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.containsThenInsertIfNew k v).fst = m.contains k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.containsThenInsertIfNew_snd {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.containsThenInsertIfNew k v).snd = m.insertIfNew k v
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).get? a = none
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_empty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} :
    ∅.get? a = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} :
    m.isEmpty = true → m.get? a = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_insert {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).get? a = if h : (k == a) = true then some (cast ⋯ v) else m.get? a
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).get? k = some v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_eq_isSome_get? {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} :
    m.contains a = (m.get? a).isSome
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isSome_get?_eq_contains {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} :
    (m.get? a).isSome = m.contains a
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_iff_isSome_get? {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} :
    a ∈ m ↔ (m.get? a).isSome = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isSome_get?_iff_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} :
    (m.get? a).isSome = true ↔ a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_eq_some_iff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    m.get? k = some v ↔ ∃ (h : k ∈ m), m.get k h = v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_eq_none_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} :
    m.contains a = false → m.get? a = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_eq_none {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} :
    ¬a ∈ m → m.get? a = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_erase {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k a : α} :
    (m.erase k).get? a = if (k == a) = true then none else m.get? a
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_erase_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} :
    (m.erase k).get? k = none
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {a : α} {c : Nat} :
    get? (emptyWithCapacity c) a = none
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_empty {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {a : α} :
    get? ∅ a = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    m.isEmpty = true → get? m a = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_insert {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    get? (m.insert k v) a = if (k == a) = true then some v else get? m a
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_insert_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    get? (m.insert k v) k = some v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.contains_eq_isSome_get? {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    m.contains a = (get? m a).isSome
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.isSome_get?_eq_contains {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    (get? m a).isSome = m.contains a
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.mem_iff_isSome_get? {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    a ∈ m ↔ (get? m a).isSome = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.isSome_get?_iff_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    (get? m a).isSome = true ↔ a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_eq_some_iff {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    get? m k = some v ↔ ∃ (h : k ∈ m), get m k h = v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_eq_none_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    m.contains a = false → get? m a = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_eq_none {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    ¬a ∈ m → get? m a = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_erase {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} :
    get? (m.erase k) a = if (k == a) = true then none else get? m a
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_erase_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    get? (m.erase k) k = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_eq_get? {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} :
    get? m a = m.get? a
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_congr {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a b : α} (hab : (a == b) = true) :
    get? m a = get? m b
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_insert {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k a : α} {v : β k} {h₁ : a ∈ m.insert k v} :
    (m.insert k v).get a h₁ = if h₂ : (k == a) = true then cast ⋯ v else m.get a ⋯
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).get k ⋯ = v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.toList_insert_perm {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).toList.Perm (⟨k, v⟩ :: List.filter (fun (x : (a : α) × β a) => decide ¬(k == x.fst) = true) m.toList)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.toList_insert_perm {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (toList (m.insert k v)).Perm ((k, v) :: List.filter (fun (x : α × β) => decide ¬(k == x.fst) = true) (toList m))
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.keys_insertIfNew_perm {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).keys.Perm (if k ∈ m then m.keys else k :: m.keys)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_erase {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k a : α} {h' : a ∈ m.erase k} :
    (m.erase k).get a h' = m.get a ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_eq_some_get {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} (h : a ∈ m) :
    m.get? a = some (m.get a h)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_eq_get_get? {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} {h : a ∈ m} :
    m.get a h = (m.get? a).get ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_get? {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} {h : (m.get? a).isSome = true} :
    (m.get? a).get h = m.get a ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_insert {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} {h₁ : a ∈ m.insert k v} :
    get (m.insert k v) a h₁ = if h₂ : (k == a) = true then v else get m a ⋯
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_insert_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    get (m.insert k v) k ⋯ = v
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_erase {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {h' : a ∈ m.erase k} :
    get (m.erase k) a h' = get m a ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_eq_some_get {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} (h : a ∈ m) :
    get? m a = some (get m a h)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_eq_get_get? {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {h : a ∈ m} :
    get m a h = (get? m a).get ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_get? {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {h : (get? m a).isSome = true} :
    (get? m a).get h = get m a ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_eq_get {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} {h : a ∈ m} :
    get m a h = m.get a h
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_congr {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a b : α} (hab : (a == b) = true) {h' : a ∈ m} :
    get m a h' = get m b ⋯
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} [Inhabited (β a)] {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).get! a = default
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_empty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} [Inhabited (β a)] :
    ∅.get! a = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} [Inhabited (β a)] :
    m.isEmpty = true → m.get! a = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_insert {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k a : α} [Inhabited (β a)] {v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).get! a = if h : (k == a) = true then cast ⋯ v else m.get! a
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} [Inhabited (β a)] {b : β a} :
    (m.insert a b).get! a = b
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_eq_default_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} [Inhabited (β a)] :
    m.contains a = false → m.get! a = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_eq_default {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} [Inhabited (β a)] :
    ¬a ∈ m → m.get! a = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_erase {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k a : α} [Inhabited (β a)] :
    (m.erase k).get! a = if (k == a) = true then default else m.get! a
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_erase_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} [Inhabited (β k)] :
    (m.erase k).get! k = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_eq_some_get!_of_contains {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} [Inhabited (β a)] :
    m.contains a = true → m.get? a = some (m.get! a)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_eq_some_get! {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} [Inhabited (β a)] :
    a ∈ m → m.get? a = some (m.get! a)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_eq_get!_get? {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} [Inhabited (β a)] :
    m.get! a = (m.get? a).get!
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_eq_get! {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} [Inhabited (β a)] {h : a ∈ m} :
    m.get a h = m.get! a
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [Inhabited β] {a : α} {c : Nat} :
    get! (emptyWithCapacity c) a = default
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_empty {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [Inhabited β] {a : α} :
    get! ∅ a = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {a : α} :
    m.isEmpty = true → get! m a = default
    source

    get! (m.insert k v) a = if (k == a) = true then v else get! m a

    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_insert_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k : α} {v : β} :
    get! (m.insert k v) k = v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_eq_default_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {a : α} :

    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_eq_default {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {a : α} :

    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_erase {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k a : α} :
    get! (m.erase k) a = if (k == a) = true then default else get! m a

    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_erase_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k : α} :

    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_eq_some_get!_of_contains {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {a : α} :
    m.contains a = true → get? m a = some (get! m a)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_eq_some_get! {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {a : α} :
    a ∈ m → get? m a = some (get! m a)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_eq_get!_get? {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {a : α} :
    get! m a = (get? m a).get!
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_eq_get! {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {a : α} {h : a ∈ m} :
    get m a h = get! m a
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_eq_get! {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited β] {a : α} :
    get! m a = m.get! a
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_congr {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {a b : α} (hab : (a == b) = true) :
    get! m a = get! m b
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} {fallback : β a} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).getD a fallback = fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_empty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} {fallback : β a} :
    ∅.getD a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} {fallback : β a} :
    m.isEmpty = true → m.getD a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_insert {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k a : α} {fallback : β a} {v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).getD a fallback = if h : (k == a) = true then cast ⋯ v else m.getD a fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {fallback v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).getD k fallback = v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_eq_fallback_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} {fallback : β a} :
    m.contains a = false → m.getD a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_eq_fallback {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} {fallback : β a} :
    ¬a ∈ m → m.getD a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_erase {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k a : α} {fallback : β a} :
    (m.erase k).getD a fallback = if (k == a) = true then fallback else m.getD a fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_erase_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {fallback : β k} :
    (m.erase k).getD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_eq_some_getD_of_contains {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} {fallback : β a} :
    m.contains a = true → m.get? a = some (m.getD a fallback)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_eq_some_getD {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} {fallback : β a} :
    a ∈ m → m.get? a = some (m.getD a fallback)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_eq_getD_get? {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} {fallback : β a} :
    m.getD a fallback = (m.get? a).getD fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_eq_getD {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} {fallback : β a} {h : a ∈ m} :
    m.get a h = m.getD a fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_eq_getD_default {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} [Inhabited (β a)] :
    m.get! a = m.getD a default
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {a : α} {fallback : β} {c : Nat} :
    getD (emptyWithCapacity c) a fallback = fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_empty {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {a : α} {fallback : β} :
    getD ∅ a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {fallback : β} :
    m.isEmpty = true → getD m a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_insert {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {fallback v : β} :
    getD (m.insert k v) a fallback = if (k == a) = true then v else getD m a fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_insert_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback v : β} :
    getD (m.insert k v) k fallback = v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_eq_fallback_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {fallback : β} :
    m.contains a = false → getD m a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_eq_fallback {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {fallback : β} :
    ¬a ∈ m → getD m a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_erase {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {fallback : β} :
    getD (m.erase k) a fallback = if (k == a) = true then fallback else getD m a fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_erase_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback : β} :
    getD (m.erase k) k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_eq_some_getD_of_contains {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {fallback : β} :
    m.contains a = true → get? m a = some (getD m a fallback)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_eq_some_getD {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {fallback : β} :
    a ∈ m → get? m a = some (getD m a fallback)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_eq_getD_get? {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {fallback : β} :
    getD m a fallback = (get? m a).getD fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_eq_getD {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {fallback : β} {h : a ∈ m} :
    get m a h = getD m a fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_eq_getD_default {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {a : α} :
    get! m a = getD m a default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_eq_getD {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulBEq α] {a : α} {fallback : β} :
    getD m a fallback = m.getD a fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_congr {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a b : α} {fallback : β} (hab : (a == b) = true) :
    getD m a fallback = getD m b fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a : α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).getKey? a = none
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_empty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a : α} :
    ∅.getKey? a = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    m.isEmpty = true → m.getKey? a = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_insert {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).getKey? a = if (k == a) = true then some k else m.getKey? a
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).getKey? k = some k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_eq_isSome_getKey? {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    m.contains a = (m.getKey? a).isSome
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isSome_getKey?_eq_contains {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    (m.getKey? a).isSome = m.contains a
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_iff_isSome_getKey? {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    a ∈ m ↔ (m.getKey? a).isSome = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isSome_getKey?_iff_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    (m.getKey? a).isSome = true ↔ a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_of_getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} (h : m.getKey? k = some k') :
    k' ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_eq_some_iff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} :
    m.getKey? k = some k' ↔ ∃ (h : k ∈ m), m.getKey k h = k'
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_eq_none_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    m.contains a = false → m.getKey? a = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_eq_none {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} :
    ¬a ∈ m → m.getKey? a = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_erase {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} :
    (m.erase k).getKey? a = if (k == a) = true then none else m.getKey? a
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_erase_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    (m.erase k).getKey? k = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_beq {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    Option.all (fun (x : α) => x == k) (m.getKey? k) = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_congr {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} (h : (k == k') = true) :
    m.getKey? k = m.getKey? k'
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_eq_some_of_contains {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} (h : m.contains k = true) :
    m.getKey? k = some k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} (h : k ∈ m) :
    m.getKey? k = some k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_insert {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β k} {h₁ : a ∈ m.insert k v} :
    (m.insert k v).getKey a h₁ = if h₂ : (k == a) = true then k else m.getKey a ⋯
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).getKey k ⋯ = k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_erase {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {h' : a ∈ m.erase k} :
    (m.erase k).getKey a h' = m.getKey a ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_eq_some_getKey {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} (h : a ∈ m) :
    m.getKey? a = some (m.getKey a h)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_eq_get_getKey? {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {h : a ∈ m} :
    m.getKey a h = (m.getKey? a).get ⋯
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_getKey? {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a : α} {h : (m.getKey? a).isSome = true} :
    (m.getKey? a).get h = m.getKey a ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_beq {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (h : k ∈ m) :
    (m.getKey k h == k) = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_congr {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k₁ k₂ : α} (h : (k₁ == k₂) = true) (h₁ : k₁ ∈ m) :
    m.getKey k₁ h₁ = m.getKey k₂ ⋯
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_eq {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} (h : k ∈ m) :
    m.getKey k h = k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [Inhabited α] {a : α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).getKey! a = default
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_empty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [Inhabited α] {a : α} :
    ∅.getKey! a = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {a : α} :
    m.isEmpty = true → m.getKey! a = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_insert {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k a : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).getKey! a = if (k == a) = true then k else m.getKey! a
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {a : α} {b : β a} :
    (m.insert a b).getKey! a = a
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_eq_default_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {a : α} :
    m.contains a = false → m.getKey! a = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_eq_default {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {a : α} :
    ¬a ∈ m → m.getKey! a = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_erase {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k a : α} :
    (m.erase k).getKey! a = if (k == a) = true then default else m.getKey! a
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_erase_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} :
    (m.erase k).getKey! k = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_eq_some_getKey!_of_contains {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {a : α} :
    m.contains a = true → m.getKey? a = some (m.getKey! a)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_eq_some_getKey! {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {a : α} :
    a ∈ m → m.getKey? a = some (m.getKey! a)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_eq_get!_getKey? {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {a : α} :
    m.getKey! a = (m.getKey? a).get!
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_eq_getKey! {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {a : α} {h : a ∈ m} :
    m.getKey a h = m.getKey! a
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_congr {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k k' : α} (h : (k == k') = true) :
    m.getKey! k = m.getKey! k'
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_eq_of_contains {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} (h : m.contains k = true) :
    m.getKey! k = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_eq_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} (h : k ∈ m) :
    m.getKey! k = k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_emptyWithCapacity {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a fallback : α} {c : Nat} :
    (emptyWithCapacity c).getKeyD a fallback = fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_empty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {a fallback : α} :
    ∅.getKeyD a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_of_isEmpty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a fallback : α} :
    m.isEmpty = true → m.getKeyD a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_insert {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a fallback : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).getKeyD a fallback = if (k == a) = true then k else m.getKeyD a fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_insert_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k fallback : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insert k v).getKeyD k fallback = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_eq_fallback_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a fallback : α} :
    m.contains a = false → m.getKeyD a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_eq_fallback {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a fallback : α} :
    ¬a ∈ m → m.getKeyD a fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_erase {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a fallback : α} :
    (m.erase k).getKeyD a fallback = if (k == a) = true then fallback else m.getKeyD a fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_erase_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k fallback : α} :
    (m.erase k).getKeyD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_eq_some_getKeyD_of_contains {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a fallback : α} :
    m.contains a = true → m.getKey? a = some (m.getKeyD a fallback)

    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_eq_some_getKeyD {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a fallback : α} :
    a ∈ m → m.getKey? a = some (m.getKeyD a fallback)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_eq_getD_getKey? {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a fallback : α} :
    m.getKeyD a fallback = (m.getKey? a).getD fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_eq_getKeyD {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {a fallback : α} {h : a ∈ m} :
    m.getKey a h = m.getKeyD a fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_eq_getKeyD_default {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {a : α} :
    m.getKey! a = m.getKeyD a default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_congr {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' fallback : α} (h : (k == k') = true) :
    m.getKeyD k fallback = m.getKeyD k' fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_eq_of_contains {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k fallback : α} (h : m.contains k = true) :
    m.getKeyD k fallback = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_eq_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k fallback : α} (h : k ∈ m) :
    m.getKeyD k fallback = k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).isEmpty = false
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).contains a = (k == a || m.contains a)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β k} :
    a ∈ m.insertIfNew k v ↔ (k == a) = true ∨ a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_insertIfNew_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).contains k = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_insertIfNew_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    k ∈ m.insertIfNew k v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_of_contains_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).contains a = true → (k == a) = false → m.contains a = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_of_mem_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β k} :
    a ∈ m.insertIfNew k v → (k == a) = false → a ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_of_contains_insertIfNew' {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).contains a = true → ¬((k == a) = true ∧ m.contains k = false) → m.contains a = true

    This is a restatement of contains_of_contains_insertIfNew that is written to exactly match the proof obligation in the statement of get_insertIfNew.

    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_of_mem_insertIfNew' {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β k} :
    a ∈ m.insertIfNew k v → ¬((k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m) → a ∈ m

    This is a restatement of mem_of_mem_insertIfNew that is written to exactly match the proof obligation in the statement of get_insertIfNew.

    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).size = if k ∈ m then m.size else m.size + 1
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_le_size_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    m.size ≤ (m.insertIfNew k v).size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_insertIfNew_le {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).size ≤ m.size + 1
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k a : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).get? a = if h : (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then some (cast ⋯ v) else m.get? a
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k a : α} {v : β k} {h₁ : a ∈ m.insertIfNew k v} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).get a h₁ = if h₂ : (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then cast ⋯ v else m.get a ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k a : α} [Inhabited (β a)] {v : β k} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).get! a = if h : (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then cast ⋯ v else m.get! a
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k a : α} {fallback : β a} {v : β k} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).getD a fallback = if h : (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then cast ⋯ v else m.getD a fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    get? (m.insertIfNew k v) a = if (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then some v else get? m a
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β} {h₁ : a ∈ m.insertIfNew k v} :
    get (m.insertIfNew k v) a h₁ = if h₂ : (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then v else get m a ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k a : α} {v : β} :
    get! (m.insertIfNew k v) a = if (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then v else get! m a
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {fallback v : β} :
    getD (m.insertIfNew k v) a fallback = if (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then v else getD m a fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).getKey? a = if (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then some k else m.getKey? a
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a : α} {v : β k} {h₁ : a ∈ m.insertIfNew k v} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).getKey a h₁ = if h₂ : (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then k else m.getKey a ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k a : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).getKey! a = if (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then k else m.getKey! a
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_insertIfNew {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k a fallback : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.insertIfNew k v).getKeyD a fallback = if (k == a) = true ∧ ¬k ∈ m then k else m.getKeyD a fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getThenInsertIfNew?_fst {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.getThenInsertIfNew? k v).fst = m.get? k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getThenInsertIfNew?_snd {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    (m.getThenInsertIfNew? k v).snd = m.insertIfNew k v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_of_get_eq {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {v : β k} {w : k ∈ m} :
    m.get k w = v → k ∈ m
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getThenInsertIfNew?_fst {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} {k : α} {v : β} :
    (getThenInsertIfNew? m k v).fst = get? m k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getThenInsertIfNew?_snd {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} {k : α} {v : β} :
    (getThenInsertIfNew? m k v).snd = m.insertIfNew k v
    source

    theorem Std.DHashMap.length_keys {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.keys.length = m.size
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_keys {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.keys.isEmpty = m.isEmpty
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_keys {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    m.keys.contains k = m.contains k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_keys {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} :
    k ∈ m.keys ↔ k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_of_mem_keys {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (h : k ∈ m.keys) :
    k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.distinct_keys {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) m.keys
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.nodup_keys {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.keys.Nodup
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.toArray_keys {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} :
    m.keys.toArray = m.keysArray
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.toList_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} :
    m.keysArray.toList = m.keys
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.keysArray.size = m.size
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.keysArray.isEmpty = m.isEmpty
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    m.keysArray.contains k = m.contains k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} :
    k ∈ m.keysArray ↔ k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.forall_mem_keysArray_iff_forall_mem_getKey {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {p : α → Prop} :
    (∀ (k : α), k ∈ m.keysArray → p k) ↔ ∀ (k : α) (h : k ∈ m), p (m.getKey k h)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_of_mem_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (h' : k ∈ m.keysArray) :
    m.contains k = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.map_fst_toList_eq_keys {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    List.map Sigma.fst m.toList = m.keys
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.length_toList {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.toList.length = m.size
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_toList {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.toList.isEmpty = m.isEmpty
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_toList_iff_get?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    ⟨k, v⟩ ∈ m.toList ↔ m.get? k = some v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.find?_toList_eq_some_iff_get?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    List.find? (fun (x : (a : α) × β a) => x.fst == k) m.toList = some ⟨k, v⟩ ↔ m.get? k = some v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.find?_toList_eq_none_iff_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    List.find? (fun (x : (a : α) × β a) => x.fst == k) m.toList = none ↔ m.contains k = false
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.find?_toList_eq_none_iff_not_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    List.find? (fun (x : (a : α) × β a) => x.fst == k) m.toList = none ↔ ¬k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.distinct_keys_toList {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) m.toList
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.map_fst_toList_eq_keys {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    List.map Prod.fst (toList m) = m.keys
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.length_toList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    (toList m).length = m.size
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.isEmpty_toList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    (toList m).isEmpty = m.isEmpty
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.mem_toList_iff_get?_eq_some {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (k, v) ∈ toList m ↔ get? m k = some v
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.mem_toList_iff_getKey?_eq_some_and_get?_eq_some {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (k, v) ∈ toList m ↔ m.getKey? k = some k ∧ get? m k = some v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_eq_some_iff_exists_beq_and_mem_toList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    get? m k = some v ↔ ∃ (k' : α), (k == k') = true ∧ (k', v) ∈ toList m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.find?_toList_eq_some_iff_getKey?_eq_some_and_get?_eq_some {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {v : β} :
    List.find? (fun (a : α × β) => a.fst == k) (toList m) = some (k', v) ↔ m.getKey? k = some k' ∧ get? m k = some v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.find?_toList_eq_none_iff_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    List.find? (fun (x : α × β) => x.fst == k) (toList m) = none ↔ m.contains k = false
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.find?_toList_eq_none_iff_not_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    List.find? (fun (x : α × β) => x.fst == k) (toList m) = none ↔ ¬k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.distinct_keys_toList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) (toList m)
    source
