    theorem Std.DHashMap.toArray_toList {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} :
    m.toList.toArray = m.toArray
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.toList_toArray {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} :
    m.toArray.toList = m.toList
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.map_fst_toArray_eq_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    Array.map Sigma.fst m.toArray = m.keysArray
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_toArray {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.toArray.size = m.size
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_toArray {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m.toArray.isEmpty = m.isEmpty
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_toArray_iff_get?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    ⟨k, v⟩ ∈ m.toArray ↔ m.get? k = some v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.find?_toArray_eq_some_iff_get?_eq_some {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {v : β k} :
    Array.find? (fun (x : (a : α) × β a) => x.fst == k) m.toArray = some ⟨k, v⟩ ↔ m.get? k = some v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.find?_toArray_eq_none_iff_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    Array.find? (fun (x : (a : α) × β a) => x.fst == k) m.toArray = none ↔ m.contains k = false
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.toArray_toList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} :
    (toList m).toArray = toArray m
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.toList_toArray {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} :
    (toArray m).toList = toList m
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.map_fst_toArray_eq_keysArray {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    Array.map Prod.fst (toArray m) = m.keysArray
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_toArray {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    (toArray m).size = m.size
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.isEmpty_toArray {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    (toArray m).isEmpty = m.isEmpty
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.mem_toArray_iff_get?_eq_some {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (k, v) ∈ toArray m ↔ get? m k = some v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_eq_some_iff_exists_beq_and_mem_toArray {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    get? m k = some v ↔ ∃ (k' : α), (k == k') = true ∧ (k', v) ∈ toArray m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.find?_toArray_eq_some_iff_getKey?_eq_some_and_get?_eq_some {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {v : β} :
    Array.find? (fun (a : α × β) => a.fst == k) (toArray m) = some (k', v) ↔ m.getKey? k = some k' ∧ get? m k = some v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.find?_toArray_eq_none_iff_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    Array.find? (fun (x : α × β) => x.fst == k) (toArray m) = none ↔ m.contains k = false
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.mem_toArray_iff_getKey?_eq_some_and_get?_eq_some {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {v : β} :
    (k, v) ∈ toArray m ↔ m.getKey? k = some k ∧ get? m k = some v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.foldM_eq_foldlM_toList {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : δ → (a : α) → β a → m' δ} {init : δ} :
    foldM f init m = List.foldlM (fun (a : δ) (b : (a : α) × β a) => f a b.fst b.snd) init m.toList
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.fold_eq_foldl_toList {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {f : δ → (a : α) → β a → δ} {init : δ} :
    fold f init m = List.foldl (fun (a : δ) (b : (a : α) × β a) => f a b.fst b.snd) init m.toList
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.forM_eq_forM {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : (a : α) → β a → m' PUnit} :
    forM f m = ForM.forM m fun (a : (a : α) × β a) => f a.fst a.snd
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.forM_eq_forM_toList {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : (a : α) × β a → m' PUnit} :
    ForM.forM m f = ForM.forM m.toList f
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.forIn_eq_forIn {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : (a : α) → β a → δ → m' (ForInStep δ)} {init : δ} :
    forIn f init m = ForIn.forIn m init fun (a : (a : α) × β a) (b : δ) => f a.fst a.snd b
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.forIn_eq_forIn_toList {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : (a : α) × β a → δ → m' (ForInStep δ)} {init : δ} :
    ForIn.forIn m init f = ForIn.forIn m.toList init f
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.foldM_eq_foldlM_keys {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : δ → α → m' δ} {init : δ} :
    foldM (fun (d : δ) (a : α) (x : β a) => f d a) init m = List.foldlM f init m.keys
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.fold_eq_foldl_keys {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {f : δ → α → δ} {init : δ} :
    fold (fun (d : δ) (a : α) (x : β a) => f d a) init m = List.foldl f init m.keys
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.forM_eq_forM_keys {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α → m' PUnit} :
    (ForM.forM m fun (a : (a : α) × β a) => f a.fst) = m.keys.forM f
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.forIn_eq_forIn_keys {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α → δ → m' (ForInStep δ)} {init : δ} :
    (ForIn.forIn m init fun (a : (a : α) × β a) (d : δ) => f a.fst d) = ForIn.forIn m.keys init f
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.foldM_eq_foldlM_toList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : δ → α → β → m' δ} {init : δ} :
    foldM f init m = List.foldlM (fun (a : δ) (b : α × β) => f a b.fst b.snd) init (toList m)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.fold_eq_foldl_toList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {δ : Type w} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} {f : δ → α → β → δ} {init : δ} :
    fold f init m = List.foldl (fun (a : δ) (b : α × β) => f a b.fst b.snd) init (toList m)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.forM_eq_forMUncurried {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m' : Type w → Type w'} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α → β → m' PUnit} :
    forM f m = forMUncurried (fun (a : α × β) => f a.fst a.snd) m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.forMUncurried_eq_forM_toList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m' : Type w → Type w'} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α × β → m' PUnit} :
    forMUncurried f m = (toList m).forM f
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.forIn_eq_forInUncurried {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α → β → δ → m' (ForInStep δ)} {init : δ} :
    forIn f init m = forInUncurried (fun (a : α × β) (b : δ) => f a.fst a.snd b) init m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.forInUncurried_eq_forIn_toList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α × β → δ → m' (ForInStep δ)} {init : δ} :
    forInUncurried f init m = ForIn.forIn (toList m) init f
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.foldM_eq_foldlM_toArray {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : δ → (a : α) → β a → m' δ} {init : δ} :
    foldM f init m = Array.foldlM (fun (a : δ) (b : (a : α) × β a) => f a b.fst b.snd) init m.toArray
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.fold_eq_foldl_toArray {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {f : δ → (a : α) → β a → δ} {init : δ} :
    fold f init m = Array.foldl (fun (a : δ) (b : (a : α) × β a) => f a b.fst b.snd) init m.toArray
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.forM_eq_forM_toArray {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : (a : α) → β a → m' PUnit} :
    forM f m = Array.forM (fun (a : (a : α) × β a) => f a.fst a.snd) m.toArray
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.forIn_eq_forIn_toArray {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : (a : α) → β a → δ → m' (ForInStep δ)} {init : δ} :
    forIn f init m = ForIn.forIn m.toArray init fun (a : (a : α) × β a) (b : δ) => f a.fst a.snd b
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.foldM_eq_foldlM_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : δ → α → m' δ} {init : δ} :
    foldM (fun (d : δ) (a : α) (x : β a) => f d a) init m = Array.foldlM f init m.keysArray
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.fold_eq_foldl_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {f : δ → α → δ} {init : δ} :
    fold (fun (d : δ) (a : α) (x : β a) => f d a) init m = Array.foldl f init m.keysArray
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.forM_eq_forM_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α → m' PUnit} :
    forM (fun (a : α) (x : β a) => f a) m = Array.forM f m.keysArray
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.forIn_eq_forIn_keysArray {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α → δ → m' (ForInStep δ)} {init : δ} :
    forIn (fun (a : α) (x : β a) (d : δ) => f a d) init m = ForIn.forIn m.keysArray init f
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.foldM_eq_foldlM_toArray {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : δ → α → β → m' δ} {init : δ} :
    foldM f init m = Array.foldlM (fun (a : δ) (b : α × β) => f a b.fst b.snd) init (toArray m)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.fold_eq_foldl_toArray {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {δ : Type w} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} {f : δ → α → β → δ} {init : δ} :
    fold f init m = Array.foldl (fun (a : δ) (b : α × β) => f a b.fst b.snd) init (toArray m)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.forM_eq_forM_toArray {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m' : Type w → Type w'} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α → β → m' PUnit} :
    forM f m = Array.forM (fun (a : α × β) => f a.fst a.snd) (toArray m)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.forIn_eq_forIn_toArray {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {δ : Type w} {m' : Type w → Type w'} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [Monad m'] [LawfulMonad m'] {f : α → β → δ → m' (ForInStep δ)} {init : δ} :
    forIn f init m = ForIn.forIn (toArray m) init fun (a : α × β) (b : δ) => f a.fst a.snd b
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.any_toList {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {p : (a : α) → β a → Bool} :
    (m.toList.any fun (x : (a : α) × β a) => p x.fst x.snd) = m.any p
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.any_eq_true_iff_exists_mem_get {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {p : (a : α) → β a → Bool} :
    m.any p = true ↔ ∃ (a : α), ∃ (h : a ∈ m), p a (m.get a h) = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.any_eq_false_iff_forall_mem_get {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {p : (a : α) → β a → Bool} :
    m.any p = false ↔ ∀ (a : α) (h : a ∈ m), p a (m.get a h) = false
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.all_toList {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {p : (a : α) → β a → Bool} :
    (m.toList.all fun (x : (a : α) × β a) => p x.fst x.snd) = m.all p
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.all_eq_not_any_not {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {p : (a : α) → β a → Bool} :
    m.all p = !m.any fun (a : α) (b : β a) => !p a b
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.any_eq_not_all_not {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {p : (a : α) → β a → Bool} :
    m.any p = !m.all fun (a : α) (b : β a) => !p a b
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.all_eq_true_iff_forall_mem_get {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {p : (a : α) → β a → Bool} :
    m.all p = true ↔ ∀ (a : α) (h : a ∈ m), p a (m.get a h) = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.all_eq_false_iff_exists_mem_get {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {p : (a : α) → β a → Bool} :
    m.all p = false ↔ ∃ (a : α), ∃ (h : a ∈ m), p a (m.get a h) = false
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.any_toList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} {p : α → β → Bool} :
    ((toList m).any fun (x : α × β) => p x.fst x.snd) = m.any p
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.any_eq_true_iff_exists_mem_getKey_get {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulHashable α] [EquivBEq α] {p : α → β → Bool} :
    m.any p = true ↔ ∃ (a : α), ∃ (h : a ∈ m), p (m.getKey a h) (get m a h) = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.any_eq_true_iff_exists_mem_get {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulBEq α] {p : α → β → Bool} :
    m.any p = true ↔ ∃ (a : α), ∃ (h : a ∈ m), p a (get m a h) = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.any_eq_false_iff_forall_mem_getKey_get {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulHashable α] [EquivBEq α] {p : α → β → Bool} :
    m.any p = false ↔ ∀ (a : α) (h : a ∈ m), p (m.getKey a h) (get m a h) = false
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.any_eq_false_iff_forall_mem_get {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulBEq α] {p : α → β → Bool} :
    m.any p = false ↔ ∀ (a : α) (h : a ∈ m), p a (get m a h) = false
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.all_toList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} {p : α → β → Bool} :
    ((toList m).all fun (x : α × β) => p x.fst x.snd) = m.all p
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.all_eq_true_iff_forall_mem_getKey_get {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {p : α → β → Bool} :
    m.all p = true ↔ ∀ (a : α) (h : a ∈ m), p (m.getKey a h) (get m a h) = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.all_eq_true_iff_forall_mem_get {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulBEq α] {p : α → β → Bool} :
    m.all p = true ↔ ∀ (a : α) (h : a ∈ m), p a (get m a h) = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.all_eq_false_iff_exists_mem_getKey_get {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {p : α → β → Bool} :
    m.all p = false ↔ ∃ (a : α), ∃ (h : a ∈ m), p (m.getKey a h) (get m a h) = false
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.all_eq_false_iff_exists_mem_get {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulBEq α] {p : α → β → Bool} :
    m.all p = false ↔ ∃ (a : α), ∃ (h : a ∈ m), p a (get m a h) = false
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.any_keys {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulHashable α] [EquivBEq α] {p : α → Bool} :
    m.keys.any p = m.any fun (a : α) (x : β) => p a
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.all_keys {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulHashable α] [EquivBEq α] {p : α → Bool} :
    m.keys.all p = m.all fun (a : α) (x : β) => p a
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.insertMany_nil {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} :
    m.insertMany [] = m
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.insertMany_list_singleton {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {k : α} {v : β k} :
    m.insertMany [⟨k, v⟩] = m.insert k v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.insertMany_cons {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k : α} {v : β k} :
    m.insertMany (⟨k, v⟩ :: l) = (m.insert k v).insertMany l
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.insertMany_append {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {l₁ l₂ : List ((a : α) × β a)} :
    m.insertMany (l₁ ++ l₂) = (m.insertMany l₁).insertMany l₂
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.insertMany_ind {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ ((a : α) × β a)] {motive : DHashMap α β → Prop} (m : DHashMap α β) (l : ρ) (init : motive m) (insert : ∀ (m : DHashMap α β) (a : α) (b : β a), motive m → motive (m.insert a b)) :
    motive (m.insertMany l)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k : α} :
    (m.insertMany l).contains k = (m.contains k || (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k : α} :
    k ∈ m.insertMany l ↔ k ∈ m ∨ (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_of_mem_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m.insertMany l) (contains_eq_false : (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k = false) :
    k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_insertMany_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ ((a : α) × β a)] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : ρ} {k : α} (h : k ∈ m) :
    k ∈ m.insertMany l
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (m.insertMany l).get? k = m.get? k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β k} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : ⟨k, v⟩ ∈ l) :
    (m.insertMany l).get? k' = some (cast ⋯ v)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k = false) {h : k ∈ m.insertMany l} :
    (m.insertMany l).get k h = m.get k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β k} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : ⟨k, v⟩ ∈ l) {h : k' ∈ m.insertMany l} :
    (m.insertMany l).get k' h = cast ⋯ v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k : α} [Inhabited (β k)] (contains_eq_false : (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (m.insertMany l).get! k = m.get! k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β k} [Inhabited (β k')] (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : ⟨k, v⟩ ∈ l) :
    (m.insertMany l).get! k' = cast ⋯ v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k : α} {fallback : β k} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (m.insertMany l).getD k fallback = m.getD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β k} {fallback : β k'} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : ⟨k, v⟩ ∈ l) :
    (m.insertMany l).getD k' fallback = cast ⋯ v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (m.insertMany l).getKey? k = m.getKey? k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Sigma.fst l) :
    (m.insertMany l).getKey? k' = some k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k = false) {h : k ∈ m.insertMany l} :
    (m.insertMany l).getKey k h = m.getKey k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Sigma.fst l) {h : k' ∈ m.insertMany l} :
    (m.insertMany l).getKey k' h = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (m.insertMany l).getKey! k = m.getKey! k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Sigma.fst l) :
    (m.insertMany l).getKey! k' = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k fallback : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (m.insertMany l).getKeyD k fallback = m.getKeyD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k k' fallback : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Sigma.fst l) :
    (m.insertMany l).getKeyD k' fallback = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) :
    (∀ (a : α), a ∈ m → (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains a = false) → (m.insertMany l).size = m.size + l.length
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_le_size_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} :
    m.size ≤ (m.insertMany l).size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_le_size_insertMany {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ ((a : α) × β a)] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : ρ} :
    m.size ≤ (m.insertMany l).size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_insertMany_list_le {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} :
    (m.insertMany l).size ≤ m.size + l.length
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} :
    (m.insertMany l).isEmpty = (m.isEmpty && l.isEmpty)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_of_isEmpty_insertMany {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ ((a : α) × β a)] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : ρ} :
    (m.insertMany l).isEmpty = true → m.isEmpty = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Equiv.beq {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [(k : α) → BEq (β k)] [∀ (k : α), ReflBEq (β k)] (h : m₁.Equiv m₂) :
    (m₁ == m₂) = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.equiv_of_beq {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [(k : α) → BEq (β k)] [∀ (k : α), LawfulBEq (β k)] (h : (m₁ == m₂) = true) :
    m₁.Equiv m₂
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.beq_iff_equiv {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [(k : α) → BEq (β k)] [∀ (k : α), LawfulBEq (β k)] :
    (m₁ == m₂) = true ↔ m₁.Equiv m₂
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Equiv.beq_congr {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [(k : α) → BEq (β k)] {m₃ m₄ : DHashMap α β} (w₁ : m₁.Equiv m₃) (w₂ : m₂.Equiv m₄) :
    (m₁ == m₂) = (m₃ == m₄)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.Equiv.beq {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [BEq β] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [ReflBEq β] (h : m₁.Equiv m₂) :
    Const.beq m₁ m₂ = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.equiv_of_beq {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [BEq β] [LawfulBEq α] [LawfulBEq β] (h : beq m₁ m₂ = true) :
    m₁.Equiv m₂
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.beq_iff_equiv {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [BEq β] [LawfulBEq α] [LawfulBEq β] :
    beq m₁ m₂ = true ↔ m₁.Equiv m₂
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.Equiv.beq_congr {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [BEq β] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {m₃ m₄ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} (w₁ : m₁.Equiv m₃) (w₂ : m₂.Equiv m₄) :
    Const.beq m₁ m₂ = Const.beq m₃ m₄
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.union_eq {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} :
    m₁.union m₂ = m₁ ∪ m₂
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_union {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).contains k = (m₁.contains k || m₂.contains k)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_union_of_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    k ∈ m₁ → k ∈ m₁ ∪ m₂
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_union_of_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    k ∈ m₂ → k ∈ m₁ ∪ m₂
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_union_iff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    k ∈ m₁ ∪ m₂ ↔ k ∈ m₁ ∨ k ∈ m₂
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_of_mem_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    k ∈ m₁ ∪ m₂ → ¬k ∈ m₂ → k ∈ m₁
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_of_mem_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    k ∈ m₁ ∪ m₂ → ¬k ∈ m₁ → k ∈ m₂
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Equiv.union_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ m₃ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (equiv : m₁.Equiv m₂) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₃).Equiv (m₂ ∪ m₃)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Equiv.union_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ m₃ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (equiv : m₂.Equiv m₃) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).Equiv (m₁ ∪ m₃)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.union_insert_right_equiv_insert_union {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {p : (a : α) × β a} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂.insert p.fst p.snd).Equiv ((m₁ ∪ m₂).insert p.fst p.snd)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Equiv.union_congr {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ m₃ m₄ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (equiv₁ : m₁.Equiv m₃) (equiv₂ : m₂.Equiv m₄) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).Equiv (m₃ ∪ m₄)
    source
    @[deprecated Std.DHashMap.union_insert_right_equiv_insert_union (since := "2025-11-03")]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.union_insert_right_equiv_union_insert {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {p : (a : α) × β a} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂.insert p.fst p.snd).Equiv ((m₁ ∪ m₂).insert p.fst p.snd)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_union {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).get? k = (m₂.get? k).or (m₁.get? k)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).get? k = m₂.get? k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).get? k = m₁.get? k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_union_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).get k ⋯ = m₂.get k mem
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) {h' : k ∈ m₁ ∪ m₂} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).get k h' = m₂.get k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) {h' : k ∈ m₁ ∪ m₂} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).get k h' = m₁.get k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_union {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {fallback : β k} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getD k fallback = m₂.getD k (m₁.getD k fallback)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {fallback : β k} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getD k fallback = m₂.getD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {fallback : β k} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getD k fallback = m₁.getD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_union {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} [Inhabited (β k)] :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).get! k = m₂.getD k (m₁.get! k)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} [Inhabited (β k)] (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).get! k = m₂.get! k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} [Inhabited (β k)] (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).get! k = m₁.get! k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_union {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKey? k = (m₂.getKey? k).or (m₁.getKey? k)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKey? k = m₂.getKey? k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKey? k = m₁.getKey? k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_union_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKey k ⋯ = m₂.getKey k mem
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) {h' : k ∈ m₁ ∪ m₂} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKey k h' = m₂.getKey k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) {h' : k ∈ m₁ ∪ m₂} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKey k h' = m₁.getKey k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_union {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k fallback : α} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKeyD k fallback = m₂.getKeyD k (m₁.getKeyD k fallback)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k fallback : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKeyD k fallback = m₂.getKeyD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k fallback : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKeyD k fallback = m₁.getKeyD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_union {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKey! k = m₂.getKeyD k (m₁.getKey! k)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [Inhabited α] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKey! k = m₂.getKey! k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [Inhabited α] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).getKey! k = m₁.getKey! k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_union_of_not_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    (∀ (a : α), a ∈ m₁ → ¬a ∈ m₂) → (m₁ ∪ m₂).size = m₁.size + m₂.size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_left_le_size_union {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m₁.size ≤ (m₁ ∪ m₂).size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_right_le_size_union {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m₂.size ≤ (m₁ ∪ m₂).size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_union_le_size_add_size {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).size ≤ m₁.size + m₂.size
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_union {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    (m₁ ∪ m₂).isEmpty = (m₁.isEmpty && m₂.isEmpty)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_union {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    get? (m₁.union m₂) k = (get? m₂ k).or (get? m₁ k)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    get? (m₁.union m₂) k = get? m₂ k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    get? (m₁.union m₂) k = get? m₁ k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_union_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (mem : m₂.contains k = true) :
    get (m₁.union m₂) k ⋯ = get m₂ k mem
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) {h' : k ∈ m₁.union m₂} :
    get (m₁.union m₂) k h' = get m₂ k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) {h' : k ∈ m₁.union m₂} :
    get (m₁.union m₂) k h' = get m₁ k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_union {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback : β} :
    getD (m₁.union m₂) k fallback = getD m₂ k (getD m₁ k fallback)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback : β} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    getD (m₁.union m₂) k fallback = getD m₂ k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback : β} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    getD (m₁.union m₂) k fallback = getD m₁ k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_union {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k : α} :
    get! (m₁.union m₂) k = getD m₂ k (get! m₁ k)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_union_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    get! (m₁.union m₂) k = get! m₂ k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_union_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    get! (m₁.union m₂) k = get! m₁ k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.inter_eq {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} :
    m₁.inter m₂ = m₁ ∩ m₂
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_inter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).contains k = (m₁.contains k && m₂.contains k)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_inter_iff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    k ∈ m₁ ∩ m₂ ↔ k ∈ m₁ ∧ k ∈ m₂
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.not_mem_inter_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    ¬k ∈ m₁ ∩ m₂
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.not_mem_inter_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    ¬k ∈ m₁ ∩ m₂
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Equiv.inter_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ m₃ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (equiv : m₁.Equiv m₂) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₃).Equiv (m₂ ∩ m₃)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Equiv.inter_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ m₃ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (equiv : m₂.Equiv m₃) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).Equiv (m₁ ∩ m₃)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Equiv.inter_congr {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ m₃ m₄ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (equiv₁ : m₁.Equiv m₃) (equiv₂ : m₂.Equiv m₄) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).Equiv (m₃ ∩ m₄)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_inter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).get? k = if k ∈ m₂ then m₁.get? k else none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_inter_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).get? k = m₁.get? k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_inter_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).get? k = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_inter_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).get? k = none
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_inter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {h_mem : k ∈ m₁ ∩ m₂} :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).get k h_mem = m₁.get k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_inter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {fallback : β k} :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).getD k fallback = if k ∈ m₂ then m₁.getD k fallback else fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_inter_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {fallback : β k} (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).getD k fallback = m₁.getD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_inter_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {fallback : β k} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).getD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_inter_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {fallback : β k} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).getD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_inter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} [Inhabited (β k)] :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).get! k = if k ∈ m₂ then m₁.get! k else default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_inter_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} [Inhabited (β k)] (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).get! k = m₁.get! k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_inter_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} [Inhabited (β k)] (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).get! k = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_inter_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} [Inhabited (β k)] (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).get! k = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_inter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).getKey? k = if k ∈ m₂ then m₁.getKey? k else none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_inter_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).getKey? k = m₁.getKey? k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_inter_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).getKey? k = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_inter_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).getKey? k = none
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_inter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {h_mem : k ∈ m₁ ∩ m₂} :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).getKey k h_mem = m₁.getKey k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_inter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k fallback : α} :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).getKeyD k fallback = if k ∈ m₂ then m₁.getKeyD k fallback else fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_inter_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k fallback : α} (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).getKeyD k fallback = m₁.getKeyD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_inter_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k fallback : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).getKeyD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_inter_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k fallback : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).getKeyD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_inter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).getKey! k = if k ∈ m₂ then m₁.getKey! k else default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_inter_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).getKey! k = m₁.getKey! k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_inter_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).getKey! k = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_inter_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).getKey! k = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_inter_le_size_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).size ≤ m₁.size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_inter_le_size_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).size ≤ m₂.size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_inter_eq_size_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (h : ∀ (a : α), a ∈ m₁ → a ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).size = m₁.size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_inter_eq_size_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (h : ∀ (a : α), a ∈ m₂ → a ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).size = m₂.size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_add_size_eq_size_union_add_size_inter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    m₁.size + m₂.size = (m₁ ∪ m₂).size + (m₁ ∩ m₂).size
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_inter_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (h : m₁.isEmpty = true) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).isEmpty = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_inter_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (h : m₂.isEmpty = true) :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).isEmpty = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_inter_iff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    (m₁ ∩ m₂).isEmpty = true ↔ ∀ (k : α), k ∈ m₁ → ¬k ∈ m₂
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_inter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    get? (m₁.inter m₂) k = if k ∈ m₂ then get? m₁ k else none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_inter_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    get? (m₁.inter m₂) k = get? m₁ k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_inter_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    get? (m₁.inter m₂) k = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_inter_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    get? (m₁.inter m₂) k = none
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_inter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {h_mem : k ∈ m₁ ∩ m₂} :
    get (m₁.inter m₂) k h_mem = get m₁ k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_inter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback : β} :
    getD (m₁.inter m₂) k fallback = if k ∈ m₂ then getD m₁ k fallback else fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_inter_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback : β} (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    getD (m₁.inter m₂) k fallback = getD m₁ k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_inter_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback : β} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    getD (m₁.inter m₂) k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_inter_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback : β} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    getD (m₁.inter m₂) k fallback = fallback
    source

    get! (m₁.inter m₂) k = if k ∈ m₂ then get! m₁ k else default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_inter_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    get! (m₁.inter m₂) k = get! m₁ k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_inter_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    get! (m₁.inter m₂) k = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_inter_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :

    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.diff_eq {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} :
    m₁.diff m₂ = m₁ \ m₂
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_diff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    (m₁ \ m₂).contains k = (m₁.contains k && !m₂.contains k)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_diff_iff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    k ∈ m₁ \ m₂ ↔ k ∈ m₁ ∧ ¬k ∈ m₂
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.not_mem_diff_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    ¬k ∈ m₁ \ m₂
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.not_mem_diff_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    ¬k ∈ m₁ \ m₂
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Equiv.diff_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ m₃ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (equiv : m₁.Equiv m₂) :
    (m₁ \ m₃).Equiv (m₂ \ m₃)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Equiv.diff_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ m₃ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (equiv : m₂.Equiv m₃) :
    (m₁ \ m₂).Equiv (m₁ \ m₃)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Equiv.diff_congr {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ m₃ m₄ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (equiv₁ : m₁.Equiv m₃) (equiv₂ : m₂.Equiv m₄) :
    (m₁ \ m₂).Equiv (m₃ \ m₄)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_diff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} :
    (m₁ \ m₂).get? k = if k ∈ m₂ then none else m₁.get? k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_diff_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ \ m₂).get? k = m₁.get? k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_diff_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ \ m₂).get? k = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_diff_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ \ m₂).get? k = none
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_diff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {h_mem : k ∈ m₁ \ m₂} :
    (m₁ \ m₂).get k h_mem = m₁.get k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_diff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {fallback : β k} :
    (m₁ \ m₂).getD k fallback = if k ∈ m₂ then fallback else m₁.getD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_diff_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {fallback : β k} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :

    source

    (m₁ \ m₂).getD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_diff_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {fallback : β k} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ \ m₂).getD k fallback = fallback
    source

    (m₁ \ m₂).get! k = if k ∈ m₂ then default else m₁.get! k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_diff_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} [Inhabited (β k)] (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
