    (m₁ \ m₂).getKeyD k fallback = if k ∈ m₂ then fallback else m₁.getKeyD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_diff_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k fallback : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ \ m₂).getKeyD k fallback = m₁.getKeyD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_diff_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k fallback : α} (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ \ m₂).getKeyD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_diff_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k fallback : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ \ m₂).getKeyD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_diff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} :
    (m₁ \ m₂).getKey! k = if k ∈ m₂ then default else m₁.getKey! k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_diff_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ \ m₂).getKey! k = m₁.getKey! k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_diff_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ \ m₂).getKey! k = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_diff_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    (m₁ \ m₂).getKey! k = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_diff_le_size_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    (m₁ \ m₂).size ≤ m₁.size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_diff_eq_size_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (h : ∀ (a : α), a ∈ m₁ → ¬a ∈ m₂) :
    (m₁ \ m₂).size = m₁.size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_diff_add_size_inter_eq_size_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    (m₁ \ m₂).size + (m₁ ∩ m₂).size = m₁.size
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_diff_left {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] (h : m₁.isEmpty = true) :
    (m₁ \ m₂).isEmpty = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_diff_iff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] :
    (m₁ \ m₂).isEmpty = true ↔ ∀ (k : α), k ∈ m₁ → k ∈ m₂
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_diff {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} :
    get? (m₁.diff m₂) k = if k ∈ m₂ then none else get? m₁ k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_diff_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    get? (m₁.diff m₂) k = get? m₁ k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_diff_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    get? (m₁.diff m₂) k = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_diff_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    get? (m₁.diff m₂) k = none
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_diff {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {h_mem : k ∈ m₁ \ m₂} :
    get (m₁.diff m₂) k h_mem = get m₁ k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_diff {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback : β} :
    getD (m₁.diff m₂) k fallback = if k ∈ m₂ then fallback else getD m₁ k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_diff_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback : β} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    getD (m₁.diff m₂) k fallback = getD m₁ k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_diff_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback : β} (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    getD (m₁.diff m₂) k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_diff_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback : β} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    getD (m₁.diff m₂) k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_diff {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k : α} :
    get! (m₁.diff m₂) k = if k ∈ m₂ then default else get! m₁ k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_diff_of_not_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₂) :
    get! (m₁.diff m₂) k = get! m₁ k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_diff_of_mem_right {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m₂) :
    get! (m₁.diff m₂) k = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_diff_of_not_mem_left {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m₁ m₂ : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m₁) :
    get! (m₁.diff m₂) k = default
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.insertMany_nil {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} :
    insertMany m [] = m
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.insertMany_list_singleton {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} {k : α} {v : β} :
    insertMany m [(k, v)] = m.insert k v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.insertMany_cons {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} {v : β} :
    insertMany m ((k, v) :: l) = insertMany (m.insert k v) l
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.insertMany_append {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} {l₁ l₂ : List (α × β)} :
    insertMany m (l₁ ++ l₂) = insertMany (insertMany m l₁) l₂
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.insertMany_ind {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ (α × β)] {motive : (DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β) → Prop} (m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β) (l : ρ) (init : motive m) (insert : ∀ (m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β) (a : α) (b : β), motive m → motive (m.insert a b)) :
    motive (insertMany m l)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.contains_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} :
    (insertMany m l).contains k = (m.contains k || (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.mem_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} :
    k ∈ insertMany m l ↔ k ∈ m ∨ (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.mem_of_mem_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (mem : k ∈ insertMany m l) (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.mem_insertMany_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ (α × β)] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : ρ} {k : α} (h : k ∈ m) :
    k ∈ insertMany m l
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey?_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (insertMany m l).getKey? k = m.getKey? k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey?_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Prod.fst l) :
    (insertMany m l).getKey? k' = some k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) {h : k ∈ insertMany m l} :
    (insertMany m l).getKey k h = m.getKey k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Prod.fst l) {h : k' ∈ insertMany m l} :
    (insertMany m l).getKey k' h = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey!_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (insertMany m l).getKey! k = m.getKey! k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey!_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Prod.fst l) :
    (insertMany m l).getKey! k' = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKeyD_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k fallback : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (insertMany m l).getKeyD k fallback = m.getKeyD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKeyD_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' fallback : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Prod.fst l) :
    (insertMany m l).getKeyD k' fallback = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) :
    (∀ (a : α), a ∈ m → (List.map Prod.fst l).contains a = false) → (insertMany m l).size = m.size + l.length
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_le_size_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} :
    m.size ≤ (insertMany m l).size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_le_size_insertMany {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ (α × β)] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : ρ} :
    m.size ≤ (insertMany m l).size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_insertMany_list_le {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} :
    (insertMany m l).size ≤ m.size + l.length
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.isEmpty_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} :
    (insertMany m l).isEmpty = (m.isEmpty && l.isEmpty)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.isEmpty_of_isEmpty_insertMany {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ (α × β)] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : ρ} :
    (insertMany m l).isEmpty = true → m.isEmpty = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    get? (insertMany m l) k = get? m k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : (k, v) ∈ l) :
    get? (insertMany m l) k' = some v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_insertMany_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} :
    get? (insertMany m l) k = (List.findSomeRev? (fun (x : α × β) => match x with | (a, b) => if (a == k) = true then some b else none) l).or (get? m k)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) {h : k ∈ insertMany m l} :
    get (insertMany m l) k h = get m k ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : (k, v) ∈ l) {h : k' ∈ insertMany m l} :
    get (insertMany m l) k' h = v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    get! (insertMany m l) k = get! m k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : (k, v) ∈ l) :
    get! (insertMany m l) k' = v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_insertMany_list_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} {fallback : β} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    getD (insertMany m l) k fallback = getD m k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_insertMany_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v fallback : β} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : (k, v) ∈ l) :
    getD (insertMany m l) k' fallback = v
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.insertManyIfNewUnit_nil {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} :
    insertManyIfNewUnit m [] = m
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.insertManyIfNewUnit_list_singleton {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} {k : α} :
    insertManyIfNewUnit m [k] = m.insertIfNew k ()
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.insertManyIfNewUnit_cons {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} {l : List α} {k : α} :
    insertManyIfNewUnit m (k :: l) = insertManyIfNewUnit (m.insertIfNew k ()) l
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.insertManyIfNewUnit_ind {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ α] {motive : (DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit) → Prop} (m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit) (l : ρ) (init : motive m) (insert : ∀ (m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit) (a : α), motive m → motive (m.insertIfNew a ())) :
    motive (insertManyIfNewUnit m l)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.contains_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} :
    (insertManyIfNewUnit m l).contains k = (m.contains k || l.contains k)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.mem_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} :
    k ∈ insertManyIfNewUnit m l ↔ k ∈ m ∨ l.contains k = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.mem_of_mem_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : l.contains k = false) :
    k ∈ insertManyIfNewUnit m l → k ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.mem_insertManyIfNewUnit_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ α] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : ρ} {k : α} (h : k ∈ m) :
    k ∈ insertManyIfNewUnit m l
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey?_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_not_mem_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m) (contains_eq_false : l.contains k = false) :
    (insertManyIfNewUnit m l).getKey? k = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey?_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_not_mem_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ l) :
    (insertManyIfNewUnit m l).getKey? k' = some k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey?_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} (h' : k ∈ m) :
    (insertManyIfNewUnit m l).getKey? k = m.getKey? k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_not_mem_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ l) {h : k' ∈ insertManyIfNewUnit m l} :
    (insertManyIfNewUnit m l).getKey k' h = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m) {h : k ∈ insertManyIfNewUnit m l} :
    (insertManyIfNewUnit m l).getKey k h = m.getKey k mem
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey!_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_not_mem_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List α} {k : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m) (contains_eq_false : l.contains k = false) :
    (insertManyIfNewUnit m l).getKey! k = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey!_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_not_mem_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List α} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ l) :
    (insertManyIfNewUnit m l).getKey! k' = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey!_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List α} {k : α} (mem : k ∈ m) :
    (insertManyIfNewUnit m l).getKey! k = m.getKey! k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKeyD_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_not_mem_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k fallback : α} (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m) (contains_eq_false : l.contains k = false) :
    (insertManyIfNewUnit m l).getKeyD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKeyD_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_not_mem_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k k' fallback : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (not_mem : ¬k ∈ m) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ l) :
    (insertManyIfNewUnit m l).getKeyD k' fallback = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKeyD_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k fallback : α} (mem : k ∈ m) :
    (insertManyIfNewUnit m l).getKeyD k fallback = m.getKeyD k fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) :
    (∀ (a : α), a ∈ m → l.contains a = false) → (insertManyIfNewUnit m l).size = m.size + l.length
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_le_size_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} :
    m.size ≤ (insertManyIfNewUnit m l).size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_le_size_insertManyIfNewUnit {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ α] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : ρ} :
    m.size ≤ (insertManyIfNewUnit m l).size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_insertManyIfNewUnit_list_le {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} :
    (insertManyIfNewUnit m l).size ≤ m.size + l.length
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.isEmpty_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} :
    (insertManyIfNewUnit m l).isEmpty = (m.isEmpty && l.isEmpty)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.isEmpty_of_isEmpty_insertManyIfNewUnit {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} {ρ : Type w} [ForIn Id ρ α] [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : ρ} :
    (insertManyIfNewUnit m l).isEmpty = true → m.isEmpty = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} :
    get? (insertManyIfNewUnit m l) k = if k ∈ m ∨ l.contains k = true then some () else none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} {l : List α} {k : α} {h : k ∈ insertManyIfNewUnit m l} :
    get (insertManyIfNewUnit m l) k h = ()
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} {l : List α} {k : α} :
    get! (insertManyIfNewUnit m l) k = ()
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_insertManyIfNewUnit_list {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => Unit} {l : List α} {k : α} {fallback : Unit} :
    getD (insertManyIfNewUnit m l) k fallback = ()
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.ofArray_eq_ofList {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} (a : Array ((a : α) × β a)) :
    ofArray a = ofList a.toList
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.ofList_nil {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} :
    ofList [] = ∅
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.ofList_singleton {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {k : α} {v : β k} :
    ofList [⟨k, v⟩] = ∅.insert k v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.ofList_cons {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {k : α} {v : β k} {tl : List ((a : α) × β a)} :
    ofList (⟨k, v⟩ :: tl) = (∅.insert k v).insertMany tl
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.ofList_eq_insertMany_empty {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} :
    ofList l = ∅.insertMany l
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_ofList {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k : α} :
    (ofList l).contains k = (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_ofList {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k : α} :
    k ∈ ofList l ↔ (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_ofList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [LawfulBEq α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (ofList l).get? k = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [LawfulBEq α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β k} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : ⟨k, v⟩ ∈ l) :
    (ofList l).get? k' = some (cast ⋯ v)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [LawfulBEq α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β k} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : ⟨k, v⟩ ∈ l) {h : k' ∈ ofList l} :
    (ofList l).get k' h = cast ⋯ v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_ofList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [LawfulBEq α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k : α} [Inhabited (β k)] (contains_eq_false : (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (ofList l).get! k = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [LawfulBEq α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β k} [Inhabited (β k')] (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : ⟨k, v⟩ ∈ l) :
    (ofList l).get! k' = cast ⋯ v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_ofList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [LawfulBEq α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k : α} {fallback : β k} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (ofList l).getD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [LawfulBEq α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β k} {fallback : β k'} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : ⟨k, v⟩ ∈ l) :
    (ofList l).getD k' fallback = cast ⋯ v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_ofList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (ofList l).getKey? k = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Sigma.fst l) :
    (ofList l).getKey? k' = some k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Sigma.fst l) {h : k' ∈ ofList l} :
    (ofList l).getKey k' h = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_ofList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (ofList l).getKey! k = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Sigma.fst l) :
    (ofList l).getKey! k' = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_ofList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k fallback : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Sigma.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (ofList l).getKeyD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} {k k' fallback : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Sigma.fst l) :
    (ofList l).getKeyD k' fallback = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_ofList {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : (a : α) × β a) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) :
    (ofList l).size = l.length
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_ofList_le {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} :
    (ofList l).size ≤ l.length
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_ofList {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List ((a : α) × β a)} :
    (ofList l).isEmpty = l.isEmpty
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.ofArray_eq_ofList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} (a : Array (α × β)) :
    ofArray a = ofList a.toList
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.ofList_nil {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} :
    ofList [] = ∅
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.ofList_singleton {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {k : α} {v : β} :
    ofList [(k, v)] = ∅.insert k v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.ofList_cons {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {k : α} {v : β} {tl : List (α × β)} :
    ofList ((k, v) :: tl) = insertMany (∅.insert k v) tl
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.ofList_eq_insertMany_empty {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {l : List (α × β)} :
    ofList l = insertMany ∅ l
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.contains_ofList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} :
    (ofList l).contains k = (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.mem_ofList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} :
    k ∈ ofList l ↔ (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_ofList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    get? (ofList l) k = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : (k, v) ∈ l) :
    get? (ofList l) k' = some v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : (k, v) ∈ l) {h : k' ∈ ofList l} :
    get (ofList l) k' h = v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_ofList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} [Inhabited β] (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    get! (ofList l) k = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v : β} [Inhabited β] (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : (k, v) ∈ l) :
    get! (ofList l) k' = v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_ofList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} {fallback : β} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    getD (ofList l) k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) {v fallback : β} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : (k, v) ∈ l) :
    getD (ofList l) k' fallback = v
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey?_ofList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (ofList l).getKey? k = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey?_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Prod.fst l) :
    (ofList l).getKey? k' = some k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Prod.fst l) {h : k' ∈ ofList l} :
    (ofList l).getKey k' h = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey!_ofList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List (α × β)} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (ofList l).getKey! k = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey!_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Prod.fst l) :
    (ofList l).getKey! k' = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKeyD_ofList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k fallback : α} (contains_eq_false : (List.map Prod.fst l).contains k = false) :
    (ofList l).getKeyD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKeyD_ofList_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} {k k' fallback : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ List.map Prod.fst l) :
    (ofList l).getKeyD k' fallback = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_ofList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α × β) => (a.fst == b.fst) = false) l) :
    (ofList l).size = l.length
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_ofList_le {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} :
    (ofList l).size ≤ l.length
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.isEmpty_ofList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List (α × β)} :
    (ofList l).isEmpty = l.isEmpty
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.unitOfArray_eq_unitOfList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} (a : Array α) :
    unitOfArray a = unitOfList a.toList
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.unitOfList_nil {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} :
    unitOfList [] = ∅
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.unitOfList_singleton {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {k : α} :
    unitOfList [k] = ∅.insertIfNew k ()
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.unitOfList_cons {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {hd : α} {tl : List α} :
    unitOfList (hd :: tl) = insertManyIfNewUnit (∅.insertIfNew hd ()) tl
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.unitOfList_eq_insertManyIfNewUnit_empty {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {l : List α} :
    unitOfList l = insertManyIfNewUnit ∅ l
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.contains_unitOfList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} :
    (unitOfList l).contains k = l.contains k
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.mem_unitOfList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} :
    k ∈ unitOfList l ↔ l.contains k = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey?_unitOfList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : l.contains k = false) :
    (unitOfList l).getKey? k = none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey?_unitOfList_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ l) :
    (unitOfList l).getKey? k' = some k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey_unitOfList_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ l) {h : k' ∈ unitOfList l} :
    (unitOfList l).getKey k' h = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey!_unitOfList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List α} {k : α} (contains_eq_false : l.contains k = false) :
    (unitOfList l).getKey! k = default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey!_unitOfList_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {l : List α} {k k' : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ l) :
    (unitOfList l).getKey! k' = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKeyD_unitOfList_of_contains_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k fallback : α} (contains_eq_false : l.contains k = false) :
    (unitOfList l).getKeyD k fallback = fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKeyD_unitOfList_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k k' fallback : α} (k_beq : (k == k') = true) (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) (mem : k ∈ l) :
    (unitOfList l).getKeyD k' fallback = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_unitOfList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} (distinct : List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => (a == b) = false) l) :
    (unitOfList l).size = l.length
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_unitOfList_le {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} :
    (unitOfList l).size ≤ l.length
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.isEmpty_unitOfList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} :
    (unitOfList l).isEmpty = l.isEmpty
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_unitOfList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {l : List α} {k : α} :
    get? (unitOfList l) k = if l.contains k = true then some () else none
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_unitOfList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {l : List α} {k : α} {h : k ∈ unitOfList l} :
    get (unitOfList l) k h = ()
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_unitOfList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {l : List α} {k : α} :
    get! (unitOfList l) k = ()
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_unitOfList {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {l : List α} {k : α} {fallback : Unit} :
    getD (unitOfList l) k fallback = ()
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_alter_eq_isEmpty_erase {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    (m.alter k f).isEmpty = ((m.erase k).isEmpty && (f (m.get? k)).isNone)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_alter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    (m.alter k f).isEmpty = ((m.isEmpty || m.size == 1 && m.contains k) && (f (m.get? k)).isNone)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_alter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    (m.alter k f).contains k' = if (k == k') = true then (f (m.get? k)).isSome else m.contains k'
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_alter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    k' ∈ m.alter k f ↔ if (k == k') = true then (f (m.get? k)).isSome = true else k' ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_alter_of_beq {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} (h : (k == k') = true) :
    k' ∈ m.alter k f ↔ (f (m.get? k)).isSome = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    (m.alter k f).contains k = (f (m.get? k)).isSome
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    k ∈ m.alter k f ↔ (f (m.get? k)).isSome = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_alter_of_beq_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} (h : (k == k') = false) :
    (m.alter k f).contains k' = m.contains k'
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_alter_of_beq_eq_false {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} (h : (k == k') = false) :
    k' ∈ m.alter k f ↔ k' ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_alter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    (m.alter k f).size = if k ∈ m ∧ (f (m.get? k)).isNone = true then m.size - 1 else if ¬k ∈ m ∧ (f (m.get? k)).isSome = true then m.size + 1 else m.size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_alter_eq_add_one {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} (h : ¬k ∈ m) (h' : (f (m.get? k)).isSome = true) :
    (m.alter k f).size = m.size + 1
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_alter_eq_sub_one {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} (h : k ∈ m) (h' : (f (m.get? k)).isNone = true) :
    (m.alter k f).size = m.size - 1
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_alter_eq_self_of_not_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} (h : ¬k ∈ m) (h' : (f (m.get? k)).isNone = true) :
    (m.alter k f).size = m.size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_alter_eq_self_of_mem {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} (h : k ∈ m) (h' : (f (m.get? k)).isSome = true) :
    (m.alter k f).size = m.size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_alter_le_size {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    (m.alter k f).size ≤ m.size + 1
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_le_size_alter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    m.size - 1 ≤ (m.alter k f).size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_alter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    (m.alter k f).get? k' = if h : (k == k') = true then cast ⋯ (f (m.get? k)) else m.get? k'
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    (m.alter k f).get? k = f (m.get? k)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_alter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} {h : k' ∈ m.alter k f} :
    (m.alter k f).get k' h = if heq : (k == k') = true then cast ⋯ ((f (m.get? k)).get ⋯) else m.get k' ⋯
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} {h : k ∈ m.alter k f} :
    (m.alter k f).get k h = (f (m.get? k)).get ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_alter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' : α} [hi : Inhabited (β k')] {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    (m.alter k f).get! k' = if heq : (k == k') = true then (Option.map (cast ⋯) (f (m.get? k))).get! else m.get! k'
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} [Inhabited (β k)] {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    (m.alter k f).get! k = (f (m.get? k)).get!
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_alter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' : α} {fallback : β k'} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    (m.alter k f).getD k' fallback = if heq : (k == k') = true then (Option.map (cast ⋯) (f (m.get? k))).getD fallback else m.getD k' fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {fallback : β k} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    (m.alter k f).getD k fallback = (f (m.get? k)).getD fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_alter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    (m.alter k f).getKey? k' = if (k == k') = true then if (f (m.get? k)).isSome = true then some k else none else m.getKey? k'
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    (m.alter k f).getKey? k = if (f (m.get? k)).isSome = true then some k else none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_alter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited α] {k k' : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    (m.alter k f).getKey! k' = if (k == k') = true then if (f (m.get? k)).isSome = true then k else default else m.getKey! k'
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    (m.alter k f).getKey! k = if (f (m.get? k)).isSome = true then k else default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} {h : k ∈ m.alter k f} :
    (m.alter k f).getKey k h = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_alter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' fallback : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    (m.alter k f).getKeyD k' fallback = if (k == k') = true then if (f (m.get? k)).isSome = true then k else fallback else m.getKeyD k' fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_alter_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited α] {k fallback : α} {f : Option (β k) → Option (β k)} :
    (m.alter k f).getKeyD k fallback = if (f (m.get? k)).isSome = true then k else fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.isEmpty_alter_eq_isEmpty_erase {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (alter m k f).isEmpty = ((m.erase k).isEmpty && (f (get? m k)).isNone)
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.isEmpty_alter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (alter m k f).isEmpty = ((m.isEmpty || m.size == 1 && m.contains k) && (f (get? m k)).isNone)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.contains_alter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (alter m k f).contains k' = if (k == k') = true then (f (get? m k)).isSome else m.contains k'
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.mem_alter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    k' ∈ alter m k f ↔ if (k == k') = true then (f (get? m k)).isSome = true else k' ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.mem_alter_of_beq {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} (h : (k == k') = true) :
    k' ∈ alter m k f ↔ (f (get? m k)).isSome = true
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.contains_alter_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (alter m k f).contains k = (f (get? m k)).isSome
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.mem_alter_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    k ∈ alter m k f ↔ (f (get? m k)).isSome = true
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.contains_alter_of_beq_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} (h : (k == k') = false) :
    (alter m k f).contains k' = m.contains k'
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.mem_alter_of_beq_eq_false {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} (h : (k == k') = false) :
    k' ∈ alter m k f ↔ k' ∈ m
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_alter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (alter m k f).size = if k ∈ m ∧ (f (get? m k)).isNone = true then m.size - 1 else if ¬k ∈ m ∧ (f (get? m k)).isSome = true then m.size + 1 else m.size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_alter_eq_add_one {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} (h : ¬k ∈ m) (h' : (f (get? m k)).isSome = true) :
    (alter m k f).size = m.size + 1
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_alter_eq_sub_one {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} (h : k ∈ m) (h' : (f (get? m k)).isNone = true) :
    (alter m k f).size = m.size - 1
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_alter_eq_self_of_not_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} (h : ¬k ∈ m) (h' : (f (get? m k)).isNone = true) :
    (alter m k f).size = m.size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_alter_eq_self_of_mem {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} (h : k ∈ m) (h' : (f (get? m k)).isSome = true) :
    (alter m k f).size = m.size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_alter_le_size {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (alter m k f).size ≤ m.size + 1
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_le_size_alter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    m.size - 1 ≤ (alter m k f).size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_alter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    get? (alter m k f) k' = if (k == k') = true then f (get? m k) else get? m k'
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_alter_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    get? (alter m k f) k = f (get? m k)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_alter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} {h : k' ∈ alter m k f} :
    get (alter m k f) k' h = if heq : (k == k') = true then (f (get? m k)).get ⋯ else get m k' ⋯
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_alter_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} {h : k ∈ alter m k f} :
    get (alter m k f) k h = (f (get? m k)).get ⋯
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_alter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} [Inhabited β] {f : Option β → Option β} :
    get! (alter m k f) k' = if (k == k') = true then (f (get? m k)).get! else get! m k'
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_alter_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} [Inhabited β] {f : Option β → Option β} :
    get! (alter m k f) k = (f (get? m k)).get!
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_alter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {fallback : β} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    getD (alter m k f) k' fallback = if (k == k') = true then (f (get? m k)).getD fallback else getD m k' fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_alter_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {fallback : β} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    getD (alter m k f) k fallback = (f (get? m k)).getD fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey?_alter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (alter m k f).getKey? k' = if (k == k') = true then if (f (get? m k)).isSome = true then some k else none else m.getKey? k'
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey?_alter_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (alter m k f).getKey? k = if (f (get? m k)).isSome = true then some k else none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey!_alter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (alter m k f).getKey! k' = if (k == k') = true then if (f (get? m k)).isSome = true then k else default else m.getKey! k'
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey!_alter_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (alter m k f).getKey! k = if (f (get? m k)).isSome = true then k else default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey_alter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k k' : α} {f : Option β → Option β} {h : k' ∈ alter m k f} :
    (alter m k f).getKey k' h = if heq : (k == k') = true then k else m.getKey k' ⋯
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey_alter_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} {f : Option β → Option β} {h : k ∈ alter m k f} :
    (alter m k f).getKey k h = k
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKeyD_alter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' fallback : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (alter m k f).getKeyD k' fallback = if (k == k') = true then if (f (get? m k)).isSome = true then k else fallback else m.getKeyD k' fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKeyD_alter_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k fallback : α} {f : Option β → Option β} :
    (alter m k f).getKeyD k fallback = if (f (get? m k)).isSome = true then k else fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_modify {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : β k → β k} :
    (m.modify k f).isEmpty = m.isEmpty
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_modify {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' : α} {f : β k → β k} :
    (m.modify k f).contains k' = m.contains k'
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_modify {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' : α} {f : β k → β k} :
    k' ∈ m.modify k f ↔ k' ∈ m
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.size_modify {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : β k → β k} :
    (m.modify k f).size = m.size
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_modify {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' : α} {f : β k → β k} :
    (m.modify k f).get? k' = if h : (k == k') = true then cast ⋯ (Option.map f (m.get? k)) else m.get? k'
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_modify_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : β k → β k} :
    (m.modify k f).get? k = Option.map f (m.get? k)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_modify {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' : α} {f : β k → β k} (h : k' ∈ m.modify k f) :
    (m.modify k f).get k' h = if heq : (k == k') = true then cast ⋯ (f (m.get k ⋯)) else m.get k' ⋯
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get_modify_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : β k → β k} {h : k ∈ m.modify k f} :
    (m.modify k f).get k h = f (m.get k ⋯)
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_modify {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' : α} [hi : Inhabited (β k')] {f : β k → β k} :
    (m.modify k f).get! k' = if heq : (k == k') = true then (Option.map (cast ⋯) (Option.map f (m.get? k))).get! else m.get! k'
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_modify_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} [Inhabited (β k)] {f : β k → β k} :
    (m.modify k f).get! k = (Option.map f (m.get? k)).get!
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_modify {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' : α} {fallback : β k'} {f : β k → β k} :
    (m.modify k f).getD k' fallback = if heq : (k == k') = true then (Option.map (cast ⋯) (Option.map f (m.get? k))).getD fallback else m.getD k' fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_modify_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {fallback : β k} {f : β k → β k} :
    (m.modify k f).getD k fallback = (Option.map f (m.get? k)).getD fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_modify {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' : α} {f : β k → β k} :
    (m.modify k f).getKey? k' = if (k == k') = true then if k ∈ m then some k else none else m.getKey? k'
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_modify_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k : α} {f : β k → β k} :
    (m.modify k f).getKey? k = if k ∈ m then some k else none
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_modify {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited α] {k k' : α} {f : β k → β k} :
    (m.modify k f).getKey! k' = if (k == k') = true then if k ∈ m then k else default else m.getKey! k'
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_modify_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} {f : β k → β k} :
    (m.modify k f).getKey! k = if k ∈ m then k else default
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_modify_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} {f : β k → β k} {h : k ∈ m.modify k f} :
    (m.modify k f).getKey k h = k

    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_modify {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {k k' fallback : α} {f : β k → β k} :
    (m.modify k f).getKeyD k' fallback = if (k == k') = true then if k ∈ m then k else fallback else m.getKeyD k' fallback
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_modify_self {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited α] {k fallback : α} {f : β k → β k} :
    (m.modify k f).getKeyD k fallback = if k ∈ m then k else fallback
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.isEmpty_modify {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : β → β} :
    (modify m k f).isEmpty = m.isEmpty

    @[simp]

    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_modify {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {f : β → β} :
    get? (modify m k f) k' = if (k == k') = true then Option.map f (get? m k) else get? m k'
    source

    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_modify_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : β → β} :

    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_modify {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k k' : α} {f : β → β} {h : k' ∈ modify m k f} :
    get (modify m k f) k' h = if heq : (k == k') = true then f (get m k ⋯) else get m k' ⋯
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_modify_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {k : α} {f : β → β} {h : k ∈ modify m k f} :

    source

    get! (modify m k f) k' = if (k == k') = true then (Option.map f (get? m k)).get! else get! m k'
    source
    @[simp]

    source

    getD (modify m k f) k' fallback = if (k == k') = true then (Option.map f (get? m k)).getD fallback else getD m k' fallback

    getD (modify m k f) k fallback = (Option.map f (get? m k)).getD fallback
    source

    (modify m k f).getKey? k' = if (k == k') = true then if k ∈ m then some k else none else m.getKey? k'
    source

    (modify m k f).getKey? k = if k ∈ m then some k else none

    (modify m k f).getKey! k' = if (k == k') = true then if k ∈ m then k else default else m.getKey! k'
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey!_modify_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} {f : β → β} :
    (modify m k f).getKey! k = if k ∈ m then k else default
    source
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey_modify {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k k' : α} {f : β → β} {h : k' ∈ modify m k f} :
    (modify m k f).getKey k' h = if (k == k') = true then k else m.getKey k' ⋯
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey_modify_self {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {k : α} {f : β → β} {h : k ∈ modify m k f} :

    source

    (modify m k f).getKeyD k fallback = if k ∈ m then k else fallback

      theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_filterMap_iff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Option (γ a)} :
      (filterMap f m).isEmpty = true ↔ ∀ (k : α) (h : k ∈ m), f k (m.get k h) = none

      theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_filterMap_eq_false_iff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Option (γ a)} :
      (filterMap f m).isEmpty = false ↔ ∃ (k : α), ∃ (h : k ∈ m), (f k (m.get k h)).isSome = true

      theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_filterMap {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Option (γ a)} {k : α} :
      (filterMap f m).contains k = Option.any (fun (x : β k) => (f k x).isSome) (m.get? k)

      k ∈ filterMap f m ↔ ∃ (h : k ∈ m), (f k (m.get k h)).isSome = true

      (filterMap f m).contains k = true → m.contains k = true
