      (filterMap (fun (k : α) => Option.guard fun (v : β k) => f k v) m).Equiv (filter f m)
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.toList_filter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} :
      (filter f m).toList.Perm (List.filter (fun (p : (a : α) × β a) => f p.fst p.snd) m.toList)
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.keys_filter_key {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {f : α → Bool} :
      (filter (fun (k : α) (x : β k) => f k) m).keys.Perm (List.filter f m.keys)
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_filter_iff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} :
      (filter f m).isEmpty = true ↔ ∀ (k : α) (h : k ∈ m), f k (m.get k h) = false
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_filter_eq_false_iff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} :
      (filter f m).isEmpty = false ↔ ∃ (k : α), ∃ (h : k ∈ m), f k (m.get k h) = true
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_filter_key_iff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → Bool} :
      (filter (fun (a : α) (x : β a) => f a) m).isEmpty = true ↔ ∀ (k : α) (h : k ∈ m), f (m.getKey k h) = false
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_filter_key_eq_false_iff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → Bool} :
      (filter (fun (a : α) (x : β a) => f a) m).isEmpty = false ↔ ∃ (k : α), ∃ (h : k ∈ m), f (m.getKey k h) = true
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_filter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} {k : α} :
      (filter f m).contains k = Option.any (f k) (m.get? k)
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_filter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} {k : α} :
      k ∈ filter f m ↔ ∃ (h : k ∈ m), f k (m.get k h) = true
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_filter_key {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → Bool} {k : α} :
      k ∈ filter (fun (a : α) (x : β a) => f a) m ↔ ∃ (h : k ∈ m), f (m.getKey k h) = true
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_of_contains_filter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} {k : α} :
      (filter f m).contains k = true → m.contains k = true
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_of_mem_filter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} {k : α} :
      k ∈ filter f m → k ∈ m
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.size_filter_le_size {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} :
      (filter f m).size ≤ m.size
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.size_filter_eq_size_iff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} :
      (filter f m).size = m.size ↔ ∀ (k : α) (h : k ∈ m), f k (m.get k h) = true
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.filter_equiv_self_iff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} :
      (filter f m).Equiv m ↔ ∀ (k : α) (h : k ∈ m), f k (m.get k h) = true
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.filter_key_equiv_self_iff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → Bool} :
      (filter (fun (k : α) (x : β k) => f k) m).Equiv m ↔ ∀ (k : α) (h : k ∈ m), f (m.getKey k h) = true
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.size_filter_key_eq_size_iff {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → Bool} :
      (filter (fun (k : α) (x : β k) => f k) m).size = m.size ↔ ∀ (k : α) (h : k ∈ m), f (m.getKey k h) = true
      source
      @[simp]
      theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_filter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} {k : α} :
      (filter f m).get? k = Option.filter (f k) (m.get? k)
      source
      @[simp]
      theorem Std.DHashMap.get_filter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} {k : α} {h' : k ∈ filter f m} :
      (filter f m).get k h' = m.get k ⋯
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_filter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} {k : α} [Inhabited (β k)] :
      (filter f m).get! k = (Option.filter (f k) (m.get? k)).get!
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_filter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} {k : α} {fallback : β k} :
      (filter f m).getD k fallback = (Option.filter (f k) (m.get? k)).getD fallback
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.keys_filter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} :
      (filter f m).keys.Perm (List.filter (fun (x : { x : α // x ∈ m.keys }) => match x with | ⟨x, h'⟩ => f x (m.get x ⋯)) m.keys.attach).unattach
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_filter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} {k : α} :
      (filter f m).getKey? k = (m.getKey? k).pfilter fun (x : α) (h' : m.getKey? k = some x) => f x (m.get x ⋯)
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_filter_key {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → Bool} {k : α} :
      (filter (fun (k : α) (x : β k) => f k) m).getKey? k = Option.filter f (m.getKey? k)
      source
      @[simp]
      theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_filter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} {k : α} {h' : k ∈ filter f m} :
      (filter f m).getKey k h' = m.getKey k ⋯
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_filter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} {k : α} :
      (filter f m).getKey! k = ((m.getKey? k).pfilter fun (x : α) (h' : m.getKey? k = some x) => f x (m.get x ⋯)).get!
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_filter_key {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {f : α → Bool} {k : α} :
      (filter (fun (k : α) (x : β k) => f k) m).getKey! k = (Option.filter f (m.getKey? k)).get!
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_filter {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → Bool} {k fallback : α} :
      (filter f m).getKeyD k fallback = ((m.getKey? k).pfilter fun (x : α) (h' : m.getKey? k = some x) => f x (m.get x ⋯)).getD fallback
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_filter_key {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → Bool} {k fallback : α} :
      (filter (fun (k : α) (x : β k) => f k) m).getKeyD k fallback = (Option.filter f (m.getKey? k)).getD fallback
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.isEmpty_filter_iff {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} :
      (filter f m).isEmpty = true ↔ ∀ (k : α) (h : k ∈ m), f (m.getKey k h) (get m k h) = false
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.isEmpty_filter_eq_false_iff {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} :
      (filter f m).isEmpty = false ↔ ∃ (k : α), ∃ (h : k ∈ m), f (m.getKey k h) (get m k h) = true
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.mem_filter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} :
      k ∈ filter f m ↔ ∃ (h' : k ∈ m), f (m.getKey k h') (get m k h') = true
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_filter_le_size {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} :
      (filter f m).size ≤ m.size
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.size_filter_eq_size_iff {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} :
      (filter f m).size = m.size ↔ ∀ (a : α) (h : a ∈ m), f (m.getKey a h) (get m a h) = true
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.filter_equiv_self_iff {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} :
      (filter f m).Equiv m ↔ ∀ (k : α) (h : k ∈ m), f (m.getKey k h) (get m k h) = true
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_filter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} :
      get? (filter f m) k = (get? m k).pfilter fun (x : β) (h' : get? m k = some x) => f (m.getKey k ⋯) x
      source
      @[simp]
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_filter' {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} :
      get? (filter f m) k = Option.filter (f k) (get? m k)

      Simpler variant of get?_filter when LawfulBEq is available.

      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_filter_of_getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k k' : α} :
      m.getKey? k = some k' → get? (filter f m) k = Option.filter (fun (x : β) => f k' x) (get? m k)
      source
      @[simp]
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_filter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} {h' : k ∈ filter f m} :
      get (filter f m) k h' = get m k ⋯
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_filter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} :
      get! (filter f m) k = ((get? m k).pfilter fun (x : β) (h' : get? m k = some x) => f (m.getKey k ⋯) x).get!
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_filter' {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited β] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} :
      get! (filter f m) k = (Option.filter (f k) (get? m k)).get!

      Simpler variant of get!_filter when LawfulBEq is available.

      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_filter_of_getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited β] {f : α → β → Bool} {k k' : α} :
      m.getKey? k = some k' → get! (filter f m) k = (Option.filter (fun (x : β) => f k' x) (get? m k)).get!
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_filter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} {fallback : β} :
      getD (filter f m) k fallback = ((get? m k).pfilter fun (x : β) (h' : get? m k = some x) => f (m.getKey k ⋯) x).getD fallback
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_filter' {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} {fallback : β} :
      getD (filter f m) k fallback = (Option.filter (f k) (get? m k)).getD fallback

      Simpler variant of getD_filter when LawfulBEq is available.

      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_filter_of_getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k k' : α} {fallback : β} :
      m.getKey? k = some k' → getD (filter f m) k fallback = (Option.filter (fun (x : β) => f k' x) (get? m k)).getD fallback
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.toList_filter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} {f : α → β → Bool} :
      (toList (filter f m)).Perm (List.filter (fun (p : α × β) => f p.fst p.snd) (toList m))
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.keys_filter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} :
      (filter f m).keys.Perm (List.filter (fun (x : { x : α // x ∈ m.keys }) => match x with | ⟨x, h'⟩ => f x (get m x ⋯)) m.keys.attach).unattach
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey?_filter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} :
      (filter f m).getKey? k = (m.getKey? k).pfilter fun (x : α) (h' : m.getKey? k = some x) => f x (get m x ⋯)
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKey!_filter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k : α} :
      (filter f m).getKey! k = ((m.getKey? k).pfilter fun (x : α) (h' : m.getKey? k = some x) => f x (get m x ⋯)).get!
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getKeyD_filter {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → Bool} {k fallback : α} :
      (filter f m).getKeyD k fallback = ((m.getKey? k).pfilter fun (x : α) (h' : m.getKey? k = some x) => f x (get m x ⋯)).getD fallback
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.map_id_equiv {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} :
      (map (fun (x : α) (v : β x) => v) m).Equiv m
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.map_map_equiv {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} {δ : α → Type w'} {f : (a : α) → β a → γ a} {g : (a : α) → γ a → δ a} :
      (map g (map f m)).Equiv (map (fun (k : α) (v : β k) => g k (f k v)) m)
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.toList_map {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} {f : (a : α) → β a → γ a} :
      (map f m).toList.Perm (List.map (fun (p : (a : α) × β a) => ⟨p.fst, f p.fst p.snd⟩) m.toList)
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.keys_map {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} {f : (a : α) → β a → γ a} :
      (map f m).keys.Perm m.keys
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.filterMap_equiv_map {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : (a : α) → β a → γ a} :
      (filterMap (fun (k : α) (v : β k) => some (f k v)) m).Equiv (map f m)
      source
      @[simp]
      theorem Std.DHashMap.isEmpty_map {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : (a : α) → β a → γ a} :
      (map f m).isEmpty = m.isEmpty
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_map {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : (a : α) → β a → γ a} {k : α} :
      (map f m).contains k = m.contains k
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.contains_of_contains_map {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : (a : α) → β a → γ a} {k : α} :
      (map f m).contains k = true → m.contains k = true
      source
      @[simp]
      theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_map {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : (a : α) → β a → γ a} {k : α} :
      k ∈ map f m ↔ k ∈ m
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.mem_of_mem_map {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : (a : α) → β a → γ a} {k : α} :
      k ∈ map f m → k ∈ m
      source
      @[simp]
      theorem Std.DHashMap.size_map {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : (a : α) → β a → γ a} :
      (map f m).size = m.size
      source
      @[simp]
      theorem Std.DHashMap.get?_map {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → γ a} {k : α} :
      (map f m).get? k = Option.map (f k) (m.get? k)
      source
      @[simp]
      theorem Std.DHashMap.get_map {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → γ a} {k : α} {h' : k ∈ map f m} :
      (map f m).get k h' = f k (m.get k ⋯)
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.get!_map {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → γ a} {k : α} [Inhabited (γ k)] :
      (map f m).get! k = (Option.map (f k) (m.get? k)).get!
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.getD_map {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} [LawfulBEq α] {f : (a : α) → β a → γ a} {k : α} {fallback : γ k} :
      (map f m).getD k fallback = (Option.map (f k) (m.get? k)).getD fallback
      source
      @[simp]
      theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey?_map {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : (a : α) → β a → γ a} {k : α} :
      (map f m).getKey? k = m.getKey? k
      source
      @[simp]
      theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey_map {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : (a : α) → β a → γ a} {k : α} {h' : k ∈ map f m} :
      (map f m).getKey k h' = m.getKey k ⋯
      source
      @[simp]
      theorem Std.DHashMap.getKey!_map {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited α] {f : (a : α) → β a → γ a} {k : α} :
      (map f m).getKey! k = m.getKey! k
      source
      @[simp]
      theorem Std.DHashMap.getKeyD_map {α : Type u} {β : α → Type v} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {m : DHashMap α β} {γ : α → Type w} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : (a : α) → β a → γ a} {k fallback : α} :
      (map f m).getKeyD k fallback = m.getKeyD k fallback
      source
      @[simp]
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_map {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} :
      get? (map f m) k = Option.map (f k) (get? m k)
      source
      @[simp]
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_map' {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} :
      get? (map f m) k = Option.pmap (fun (v : β) (h' : k ∈ m) => f (m.getKey k h') v) (get? m k) ⋯

      Variant of get?_map that holds with EquivBEq (i.e. without LawfulBEq).

      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get?_map_of_getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → γ} {k k' : α} (h : m.getKey? k = some k') :
      get? (map f m) k = Option.map (f k') (get? m k)
      source
      @[simp]
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_map {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} {h' : k ∈ map f m} :
      get (map f m) k h' = f k (get m k ⋯)
      source
      @[simp]
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get_map' {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} {h' : k ∈ map f m} :
      get (map f m) k h' = f (m.getKey k ⋯) (get m k ⋯)

      Variant of get_map that holds with EquivBEq (i.e. without LawfulBEq).

      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_map {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulBEq α] [Inhabited γ] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} :
      get! (map f m) k = (Option.map (f k) (get? m k)).get!
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_map' {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited γ] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} :
      get! (map f m) k = (Option.pmap (fun (v : β) (h : k ∈ m) => f (m.getKey k h) v) (get? m k) ⋯).get!

      Variant of get!_map that holds with EquivBEq (i.e. without LawfulBEq).

      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.get!_map_of_getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited γ] {f : α → β → γ} {k k' : α} (h : m.getKey? k = some k') :
      get! (map f m) k = (Option.map (f k') (get? m k)).get!
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_map {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [LawfulBEq α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} {fallback : γ} :
      getD (map f m) k fallback = (Option.map (f k) (get? m k)).getD fallback
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_map' {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] {f : α → β → γ} {k : α} {fallback : γ} :
      getD (map f m) k fallback = (Option.pmap (fun (v : β) (h : k ∈ m) => f (m.getKey k h) v) (get? m k) ⋯).getD fallback

      Variant of getD_map that holds with EquivBEq (i.e. without LawfulBEq).

      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.getD_map_of_getKey?_eq_some {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} [EquivBEq α] [LawfulHashable α] [Inhabited γ] {f : α → β → γ} {k k' : α} {fallback : γ} (h : m.getKey? k = some k') :
      getD (map f m) k fallback = (Option.map (f k') (get? m k)).getD fallback
      source
      theorem Std.DHashMap.Const.toList_map {α : Type u} {x✝ : BEq α} {x✝¹ : Hashable α} {β : Type v} {γ : Type w} {m : DHashMap α fun (x : α) => β} {f : α → β → γ} :
      (toList (map f m)).Perm (List.map (fun (p : α × β) => (p.fst, f p.fst p.snd)) (toList m))
